policy.name: TBM Default
policy.description: Bundled default policy for the bleakleymm validate tool. Passes any file MediaInfo can parse — an intentionally loose placeholder. WARNING: in practice this passes effectively any file (including zero-byte ones) because MediaConch's "exists" operator is lenient. Rely on the ffprobe parse check for real rejection, and replace this policy with a format-specific one via --policy for actual preservation validation.
